manifest-validator.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */manifest.json) DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); if command -v web-ext >/dev/null 2>&1; then web-ext lint --source-dir "$DIR" --warnings-as-errors=false 2>&1 | head -30 && echo "✓ manifest validated"; else echo "⚠ web-ext not installed, skipping validation"; fi;; esac; true'
manifest-validator.description: Validate manifest.json on save using web-ext CLI. Catches manifest errors, permission issues, and cross-browser incompatibilities.

extension-linter.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */entrypoints/*.ts|*/entrypoints/*.tsx|*/entrypoints/*.js|*/entrypoints/*.jsx) if command -v eslint >/dev/null 2>&1; then eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --max-warnings 10 "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20 && echo "✓ extension linted"; elif command -v biome >/dev/null 2>&1; then biome check "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20 && echo "✓ extension linted (biome)"; else echo "⚠ No linter found (eslint or biome)"; fi;; esac; true'
extension-linter.description: Lint extension entrypoint code for deprecated APIs, security issues, and best practices.
checks: Missing error handling on API calls

wasm-build-check.description: Verify WASM builds succeed after Rust changes
